data.author: costashatz
data.message: Make building of tests optional; Boost is a big dependency to have by default

data.author: wxmerkt
data.message:
Ignore Wsign-conversion warnings

There are a lot of implicit std::size_t to Eigen::Index (long)
conversions. This deactivates the warnings for now since fixing them
directly might be quite verbose (by explicit casting everywhere)
